description: US-413 completion output eval — golden cases over the bundled gst-3.2.5 kernel index. Metric: expected item present within top-k (after sortText ordering) + ranking sanity (workspace > kernel, variable > class) + keyword-snippet insertion + facts-only (no binary selectors offered as words). The `▮` marks the cursor; `workspaceSelectors`/`workspaceClasses` are injected as workspace-provenance candidates alongside the real bundled kernel.

cases.name: AC2 selector context after a receiver offers a kernel selector
AC2 unary selector by camel-hump (dN -> doesNotUnderstand:)
AC4 multi-part keyword selector inserts as a snippet
AC2 ranking: workspace selector ranks above the kernel selector
AC3 head context offers a kernel class name (camel-hump OC)
AC3 head context offers in-scope instance variable
AC3 ranking: in-scope variable ranks above a class of the same prefix
AC5/off-by-construction: binary selectors are not offered for a typed word
